experiments.name: Evaporation
experiments.instruction: Drag the heat source to the water to see what happens!
experiments.result: The water heats up and turns into water vapor (gas). This is called evaporation!

experiments.name: Condensation
experiments.instruction: Drag the water vapor to the cold surface!
experiments.result: The water vapor cools down and turns back into liquid drops. This is condensation!

experiments.name: Precipitation
experiments.instruction: Add water drops to the cloud until it rains!
experiments.result: The cloud becomes too heavy and releases rain! This is precipitation!

experiments.name: Collection
experiments.instruction: Guide the rainwater to its destination!
experiments.result: Rainwater flows into rivers and then into the ocean, ready to evaporate again! The cycle continues!
